# HamroLink - AI-Powered Website Builder for Nepal

> HamroLink is a SaaS platform allowing Nepali businesses, schools, and individuals to build websites with built-in eSewa/Khalti integration and AI chatbots.

## Core Resources
- [Pricing](https://hamrolink.com/pricing): Monthly and yearly plans starting from NPR 199. Includes free .com.np assistance.
- [Features](https://hamrolink.com/features): Drag-and-drop editor, AI staff, QR codes, and school management systems.
- [Stories](https://hamrolink.com/stories): Case studies of Nepali businesses using HamroLink.
- [Documentation](https://hamrolink.com/docs): Technical guides for setting up custom domains and stores.

## Recent Guides
- [Why Nepali Businesses need a Website](https://hamrolink.com/blog/why-nepali-businesses-dont-have-websites)
- [Facebook Page vs Website](https://hamrolink.com/blog/facebook-page-vs-website-nepali-businesses)

## Local Context
- Currency: NPR (Nepali Rupees)
- Payments: eSewa, Khalti, IME Pay supported.
- Languages: Full support for English and Nepali interfaces.
